content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:EPI_TPM_poster.png|thumb|200px|[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] was released in May 1999.]]

A list of events in '''1999''' related to ''[[Star Wars]]''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 17: Darth Vader's Return]] ''published.
*[[January 13|13]] – [[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 3|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 3]] published.
*[[January 27|27]] – [[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 1|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 1]] published.
*27 – [[Star Wars (1998) 2|''Star Wars'' (1998) 2]] published.
*27 – [[Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back 1|''Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back'' 1]] published.
*27 – [[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 4|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 4]] published.

==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 18: Rogue Squadron to the Rescue]] ''published.
*[[February 2|02]] – ''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' published.
*[[February 3|03]] – [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Requiem for a Rogue (TPB)|''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Requiem for a Rogue'' trade paperback]] published.
*03 – [[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 6|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 6]] published.
*[[February 10|10]] – [[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 4|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 4]] published.
*[[February 16|16]] – ''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]'' published.
*[[February 17|17]] – [[Vader's Quest 1|''Vader's Quest'' 1]] published.
*17 – [[Star Wars (1998) 3|''Star Wars'' (1998) 3]] published.
*[[February 24|24]] – [[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 2|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 2]] published.
*24 – [[Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back 2|''Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back'' 2]] published.
*[[February 25|25]] – [[Star Wars Insider 42|''Star Wars Insider'' 42]] published.
*[[February 28|28]] – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] platform.
*?? – [[Star Wars Galaxy Collector 5|''Star Wars Galaxy Collector'' 5]] published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Emergency in Escape Pod Four]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Journey Across Planet X]]'' published.

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 19: Bounty on Bonadan]]'' published.
*[[March 10|10]] – [[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 5|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 5]] published.
*[[March 17|17]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 4|''Star Wars'' (1998) 4]] published.
*17 – [[Vader's Quest 2|''Vader's Quest'' 2]] published.
*[[March 24|24]] – [[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 3|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 3]] published.
*[[March 31|31]] – [[Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back 3|''Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back'' 3]] published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: The Art of Dave Dorman]]'' re-published by [[Welcome Rain Publishers]].

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 20: Total Destruction]]'' published.
*[[April 13|13]] – ''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' published.
*[[April 14|14]] – [[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 6|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 6]] published.
*[[April 21|21]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' novelization]] published.
*21 – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace Illustrated Screenplay]]'' published.
*21 – [[Star Wars (1998) 5|''Star Wars'' (1998) 5]] published.
*21 – [[Vader's Quest 3|''Vader's Quest'' 3]] published.
*[[April 25|25]] – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: I Am a Jedi]]'' published.
*25 – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: Watch Out, Jar Jar!]]'' published.
*25 – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: Anakin's Race for Freedom]]'' published.
*[[April 28|28]] – [[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 4|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 4]] published.
*28 – [[Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... 2|''Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago...'' 2]] published.
*28 – [[Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back 4|''Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back'' 4]] published.
*[[April 30|30]] – [[May 2]] – [[Celebration (1999)|Celebration]] held in Denver, Colorado to celebrate the release of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']].

==May==
*[[May 3|03]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (junior novelization)|''Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace'' junior novelization]] published.
*03 – [[Star Wars: Episode I (toy line)|''Star Wars: Episode I'' toy line]] launched.
*03 – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: I Am a Droid]]'' published.
*03 – ''[[Star Wars Episode I Journal: Anakin Skywalker]] ''published.
*03 – ''[[Star Wars Episode I Journal: Queen Amidala]] ''published.
*03 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Rising Force]]'' published.
*03 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dark Rival]]'' published.
*03 – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*03 – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: Heroes and Villains Coloring Book]]'' published.
*[[May 5|05]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 1|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' 1]] published.
*05 – [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: In the Empire's Service (TPB)|''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: In the Empire's Service'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[May 10|10]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Incredible Cross-Sections]]'' published.
*[[May 11|11]] – ''[[Anakin to the Rescue]]'' published.
*[[May 12|12]] – Advance ticket sales begin for [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].
*12 – [[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 2|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' 2]] published.
*[[May 18|18]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]] released on the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] platform.
*[[May 19|19]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|'''''Star Wars''''': '''Episode I''' '''''The Phantom Menace''''']] is released in theatres.
*19 – [[LEGO]]'s line of ''Star Wars'' merchandise becomes available.
*20 – [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] released on the [[Wikipedia:Nintendo 64|Nintendo 64]] platform.
*19 – [[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 3|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' 3]] published.
*19 – ''[[Episode I: Anakin Skywalker]]'' published.
*19 – [[Star Wars (1998) 6|''Star Wars'' (1998) 6]] published.
*19 – [[Vader's Quest 4|''Vader's Quest'' 4]] published.
*[[May 24|24]] – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier]]'' released.
*[[May 26|26]] – [[Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... 3|''Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago...'' 3]] published.
*26 – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I The Visual Dictionary]]'' published.
*26 – [[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 4|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' 4]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Galaxy Collector 6|''Star Wars Galaxy Collector'' 6]] published.

==June==
*[[June 2|02]] – ''[[Episode I: Obi-Wan Kenobi]]'' published.
*02 – [[The Last Command (TPB)|''The Last Command'']] released as trade paperback.
*[[June 15|15]] – ''[[From Star Wars to Star Wars: The Story of Industrial Light & Magic]]'' airs on [[Wikipedia:Fox Broadcasting Company|FOX]]
*[[June 16|16]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*[[June 23|23]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Insider's Guide]]'' published.
*23 – [[Star Wars (1998) 7|''Star Wars'' (1998) 7]] published.
*[[June 29|29]] – [[Declan Mulholland]] dies.

==July==
*[[July 6|06]] – ''[[Hard Merchandise]]'' published.
*[[July 7|07]] – [[Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi 1|''Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi'' 1]] published.
*[[July 21|21]] – ''[[Episode I: The Phantom Menace ½]] published.
*21 – ''[[Star Wars Handbook 2: Crimson Empire]]'' published.
*[[July 28|28]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 8|''Star Wars'' (1998) 8]] published.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Hidden Past]]'' published.
*[[August 3|03]] – ''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' published.
*[[August 4|04]] – [[Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi 2|''Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi'' 2]] published.
*04 – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Blood and Honor]]'' published.
*[[August 11|11]] – ''[[The Bounty Hunters: Aurra Sing]]'' published.
*11 – ''[[Luke Skywalker's Walkabout]]'' published.
*[[August 13|13]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] released to theaters in [[Wikipedia:Iceland|Iceland]].
*[[August 23|23]] – [[Star Wars Insider 45|''Star Wars Insider'' 45]] published.
*[[August 25|25]] – [[Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... 6|''Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago...'' 6]] published.
*25 – [[Star Wars (1998) 9|''Star Wars'' (1998) 9]] published.
*?? – [[Morris Bush]] dies.
*?? – [[Star Wars Galaxy Collector 7|''Star Wars Galaxy Collector'' 7]] published.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – [[Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand (TPB)|''Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand'' trade paperback]] published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi 3|''Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi'' 3]] published.
*[[September 7|07]] – ''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace]]'' published.
*[[September 8|08]] – ''[[The Bounty Hunters: Scoundrel's Wages]]'' published.
*[[September 13|13]] – ''[[Star Wars: Pit Droids]]'' released.
*[[September 15|15]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]] released on the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation|PlayStation]] platform.
*[[September 22|22]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 10|''Star Wars'' (1998) 10]] published.
*[[September 29|29]] – [[Star Wars Tales 1|''Star Wars Tales'' 1]] published.
*?? – ''[[C-3PO: Tales of the Golden Droid]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Episode I Adventures 1: Search for the Lost Jedi]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 1: Search for the Lost Jedi]]'' published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – ''[[Episode I Adventures 2: The Bartokk Assassins]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 2: The Bartokk Assassins]] ''published.
*01 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Mark of the Crown]]'' published.
*[[October 5|05]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', the first book in [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|The New Jedi Order]] series, published.
*[[October 6|06]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire (TPB)|Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire trade paperback]]'' published.
*06 – [[Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi 4|''Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi'' 4]] published.
*[[October 13|13]] – ''[[The Bounty Hunters: Kenix Kil]]'' published.
*[[October 27|27]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 11|''Star Wars'' (1998) 11]] published.
*27 – [[Star Wars Insider 46|''Star Wars Insider'' 46]] published.

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – ''[[Episode I Adventures 3: The Fury of Darth Maul]] ''published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 3: The Fury of Darth Maul]] ''published.
*[[November 3|03]] – [[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood (TPB)|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[November 10|10]] – [[Union 1|''Union'' 1]] published.
*[[November 11|11]] – [[Mary Kay Bergman]] dies.
*[[November 24|24]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 12|''Star Wars'' (1998) 12]] published.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – ''[[Episode I Adventures 4: Jedi Emergency]] ''published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 4: Jedi Emergency]] ''published.
*01 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Defenders of the Dead]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Tales from the New Republic]]'' published.
*[[December 5|05]] – [[Edvin Biuković]] dies.
*[[December 7|07]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] released on the [[Wikipedia:Nintendo Game Boy|Nintendo Game Boy]] platform.
*[[December 8|08]] – [[Union 2|''Union'' 2]] published.
*08 – [[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (hardcover)|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' hardcover]] published.
*[[December 15|15]] – [[Vader's Quest (TPB)|''Vader's Quest'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[December 16|16]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] released on the [[Wikipedia:Mac (computer)|Mac]] platform.
*[[December 22|22]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 13|''Star Wars'' (1998) 13]] published.
*22 – [[Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace 1|''Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace'' 1]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Galaxy Collector 8|''Star Wars Galaxy Collector'' 8]] published.

==Unknown==
*– [[Star Wars Insider 41|''Star Wars Insider'' 41]] published in December [[1998]]/January.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 42|''Star Wars Insider'' 42]] published in February/March.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 43|''Star Wars Insider'' 43]] published in April/May.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 44|''Star Wars Insider'' 44]] published in June/July.
